transcript: Pets are animals that live together with people in their homes. They keep us company and make us happy. The most popular pets are cats and dogs, but lots of other animals can become pets too. Many people like to watch the life of fish. They have fish tanks in their home with beautiful, colorful fish from all over the world. Other people prefer birds as companions. They enjoy their songs and funny manners. That's why there are parrots, canary birds, pigeons, and many other feathery friends living together with people. Rabbits, guinea pigs, hamsters, hedgehogs, monkeys, turtles, mini pigs, lizards, and even crocodiles can be pets too. People take care of their pets, they play, spend time together, and become great friends. Play with me in the Kids Academy app and learn about math, reading, writing, and more. Scan the QR code or use the link in the description. Let's have fun!
